metadata.description: A marketplace for skills and tools for agentic Power BI development.

plugins.name: goblin-mode
plugins.description: Set up, audit, and improve your agentic Power BI development workspace.

plugins.name: tabular-editor
plugins.description: Automate semantic models from the terminal with Tabular Editor.

plugins.name: pbi-desktop
plugins.description: Inspect and query the live Power BI Desktop model via TOM and ADOMD.NET.

plugins.name: pbip
plugins.description: Edit and understand PBIP projects, including TMDL, PBIR, and project structure.

plugins.name: semantic-models
plugins.description: Design, build, optimize, and review Power BI semantic models.

plugins.name: reports
plugins.description: Build, format, optimize, and review interactive Power BI reports.

plugins.name: paginated-reports
plugins.description: Author, validate, publish, and test print-ready paginated reports.

plugins.name: fabric-cli
plugins.description: Connect to, read, and modify anything in Fabric via the CLI.

plugins.name: fabric-admin
plugins.description: Audit tenant settings, governance, security groups, and Fabric admin state.

plugins.name: custom-visuals
plugins.description: Build Deneb, Python, R, SVG, and pbiviz custom visuals for Power BI.

plugins.name: etl
plugins.description: Inspect, query, and transform lakehouse data with Spark, Livy, and DuckDB.
